name: canshare-who-ovarian-germ-cell-primary
title: NZ WHO ovarian germ cell primary histology
description: Histologies used for ovarian germ cell primaries (from WHO Classification of Tumours, Female Genital Tumours, latest edition) or an 'Other' value.
